summary: Closed the S005 terminal runtime verification-first slice by adding a local CLI runtime-proof test across claimed task payload, real local command execution, ack/progress, and finish payload writeback. The proof passed without requiring production code changes.
remaining_risks: S005 proves the single-agent terminal runtime surface through local CLI/API-focused tests; S006 still needs broader deliverability E2E and permission-gate verification before a deliverable judgment.
Multi-instance coordination remains a later candidate after final single-agent deliverability gates.
Production remote-orphan governance remains a later candidate and is not claimed by S005.
Background process-manager integration remains an operator/deployment risk outside repo-owned S004/S005 scope.
